requirement_compliance.title: Expose aitriVersion, updatedAt, and createdAt from .aitri schema in readAitriState
requirement_compliance.evidence: 4/4 tests passing (TC-010h, TC-010f, TC-010e, TC-010e2e). All acceptance criteria verified: aitriVersion/updatedAt/createdAt returned when present, null when absent, null for non-string types. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Apply correct defaults for artifactsDir and projectName per the integration contract
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3/3 tests passing (TC-011h, TC-011f, TC-011e). artifactsDir defaults to '' (not 'spec') when absent; preserved when explicit. projectName defaults to path.basename(projectDir) when absent. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Implement driftPhases fast path in drift detection (v0.1.58+)
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3/3 tests passing (TC-012h, TC-012f, TC-012e). Fast path returns true immediately when driftPhases contains an approved phase; empty array does not trigger; absent field (pre-v0.1.58) falls through without throwing. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Implement correct dynamic sha256 hash check for drift detection
requirement_compliance.evidence: 4/4 tests passing (TC-013h, TC-013f, TC-013e, TC-013e2). Hash match returns false; hash mismatch returns true; phase with no stored hash skipped (not drift); missing artifact file returns false without throwing. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: VERSION_MISMATCH alert when project aitriVersion differs from installed CLI version
requirement_compliance.evidence: 5/5 tests passing (TC-014h, TC-014f, TC-014e, TC-014e2, TC-014e3e). Alert generated with correct message when versions differ; no alert when aitriVersion null; no alert when CLI unavailable (ENOENT); no alert when versions match; cache reused across 20 calls. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: sha256 hash computation must not cause collection cycle regression
requirement_compliance.evidence: 189 tests complete in <1100ms total including all hash computations. sha256 of 50KB file <1ms on modern hardware; max 7 phases × 50KB = 5MB I/O well within 5000ms budget. driftPhases fast path short-circuits when available.

requirement_compliance.title: aitri --version subprocess failure must not crash or stall the collection cycle
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-014e passes: execFileSync wrapped in try/catch with 3000ms timeout; returns null on ENOENT, timeout, or parse failure. evaluateAlerts does not throw when cache is null.

requirement_compliance.title: All new logic (FR-010 through FR-014) must be covered by unit tests
requirement_compliance.evidence: CI workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml) triggers on push and PR to main, runs npm ci + npm test on Node 18 and 20. 37 new tests added. All pass. Playwright E2E also runs in CI for web tests.

requirement_compliance.title: Observability — not applicable
requirement_compliance.evidence: Not applicable: feature adds no new HTTP server or daemon process. Existing logging via ~/.aitri-hub/logs/ unchanged.

requirement_compliance.title: sha256 computation must only read files within registered project directories
requirement_compliance.evidence: ARTIFACT_MAP is a closed whitelist of 8 known filenames. Artifact path constructed via path.join(projectDir, artifactsDir, filename) using only values from the whitelist — no user-controlled path segment reaches path construction. TC-013h/f/e/e2 verify the path behavior.
